diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@
     

     ckpt_dir = os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint)

     candidates = [(args.checkpoint, 1.0)]

-    for name, w in [('cnxt2.pt', 1.0), ('cnxt3.pt', 1.0), ('cnxt_hires.pt', 1.5), ('cnxt_hires2.pt', 0.5)]:

+    for name, w in [('cnxt2.pt', 1.0), ('cnxt3.pt', 1.0), ('cnxt_hires.pt', 1.3), ('cnxt_hires2.pt', 0.6)]:

         p = os.path.join(ckpt_dir, name)

         if os.path.exists(p):

             candidates.append((p, w))
